galprime.plotting package¶

Submodules¶

galprime.plotting.cutout_plots module¶

galprime.plotting.cutout_plots.view_cutouts(cutouts, output='', dpi=150, show_index=False, log_scale=True, limits=1, - 3, cmap='magma_r')[source]¶

Generate cutouts plot for input filename
